title: DIY Doctor Universal Shower Set – High-Pressure 5-Mode Shower Head & 1.75m Stainless Steel Anti-Kink Hose – Chrome Finish with Limescale Removal, Packaging May Vary
features: 5 SPRAY MODES FOR ALL PREFERENCES: Switch between 5 spray modes, including Power Jet for a high-pressure shower, Massage for relaxation, and Rain for a soothing experience. Customize your shower to match your mood with easy-to-adjust settings.

EFFORTLESS LIMESCALE REMOVAL: Silicone nozzles prevent limescale buildup, ensuring consistent water pressure and easy maintenance. A simple wipe keeps the shower head performing at its best, prolonging its life and saving you time on cleaning.

UNIVERSAL 0.5 INCH BSP FIT: This shower head fits all standard 0.5-inch BSP hoses for quick, tool-free installation. Compatible with any home, rental, or travel setup, making it a versatile choice for all your showering needs.

PREMIUM MATERIALS WITH CHROME FINISH: Crafted from durable ABS and TPR, this shower head features a sleek chrome finish that enhances any bathroom. Built to last, it resists wear and corrosion, ensuring long-term use without sacrificing style.

PORTABLE & LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN: Perfect for homes, rentals, hotels, or travel. Its compact, lightweight design makes it easy to carry and install anywhere. Enjoy a powerful, efficient shower no matter where you are.
description: Product Description 5 SPRAY MODES NEVER CLOG UNIVERSAL FITTING PREMIUM CHROME SHOWER HEAD: HIGH-PRESSURE & VERSATILE Durable ABS and TPR construction for long-lasting reliability and high-pressure performance. With its stylish chrome finish, this shower head complies with the global 0.5-inch BSP standard. Features FULL POWER JET, MASSAGE, and RAIN modes, plus two combined modes for versatility. Easy DIY installation with no need for additional tools. Silicone nozzles make it easy to clean limescale buildup.
